trained_with: LIVE micro cache-XOR (per step) XOR meso GPU-droop XOR macro CPU->GPU SMU XOR per-die fp
honest_scope: micro/meso/macro are real nonlinear physical computations, all load-bearing & trained against LIVE silicon, but generic across like-silicon; per-die uniqueness from FUSED prefcore fingerprint (remote-attestation grade, n=2). Novelty = the integration: a real LLM made dependent on a fused MULTI-LAYER live physical computation across the macro->micro stack + per-die binding + fresh nonce.
verdict: MULTI-LAYER EMBODIMENT GREEN: a real GPT-2 needs EACH of its body's three physical computation layers (micro cache, meso GPU droop, macro CPU->GPU power), its own die's fingerprint, and a fresh nonce. Remove any layer -> it fails.
